caption: They think I’m just here to discuss syllabus changes, but oh, how they watch when I bend over to pick up that dropped pen. 📚✨ Today’s adventure? A surprise faculty meeting in the old library’s archives. The air is thick with the scent of aged paper and anticipation. I’m wearing my favorite tailored cream blouse, the fabric thin enough to hint at the fullness of my bust without spilling out, paired with a high-waisted pencil skirt that hugs my hips like a second skin. Every step I take, the fabric pulls taut across my backside, a subtle reminder of what lies beneath. 🍑 As I reach for the high shelf, my colleagues pretend to be engrossed in their books, but I catch the lingering gazes. One particular professor clears his throat, eyes dropping momentarily to my chest before snapping back up, a faint blush on his cheeks. The tension is palpable, sweet and spicy all at once. I straighten up, adjusting my blazer, feeling the power of their desire radiating towards me. It’s not just about the lecture; it’s about the unspoken dance between teacher and student, professor and peer. And I love every second of it. 💋🔥 #UniversityLife #TeacherVibes #SexyAcademia #FacultyLove #SubtleSexiness #LibraryDates #ProfessionalYetPlayful #AcademicChic #HiddenCurves #UniversityAdventures
